name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-googlemeet
description: MemberJunction: Google Meet Realtime Bridge driver. Connects the realtime agent engine to a Google Meet meeting (audio in/out, diarized roster, participant mute) via an injectable Google Meet Media API seam, and contributes a Meeting Controls facilitator channel. Note: the Google Meet Media API is early-access/allowlisted and offers NO hand-raise.
author: MemberJunction.com
